archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro / Tactical Control Room) combined with Archetype 1 (Organic Earth tones for Yerba Mate context)

typography.instructions: Never use Inter for headings. Use IBM Plex Sans for all structural text and JetBrains Mono for all numbers, metrics, and KPI values.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-[1920px] mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 lg:p-8
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 xl:grid-cols-12 gap-1 bg-border/40 p-[1px] rounded-sm
spacing_and_layout.instructions: Use a hairline grid layout. Wrap the main dashboard in a container with a subtle background color (bg-border) and gap-px or gap-1. Make all widget children have bg-surface. This creates a highly technical, border-collapse 'exposed skeleton' SCADA look. Eliminate standard card gaps.

surface_strategy.borders: border-none (use the grid background for hairline borders)
surface_strategy.glassmorphism: Avoid completely. Use flat matte backgrounds to prevent visual refraction of industrial data.

cards.style: Flat, zero radius, no shadow. Relies on layout grid for borders. Inner padding p-4 or p-6.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 rounded-sm hover:bg-slate-200 px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-border bg-transparent text-slate-300 hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ai_action: bg-amber-300/10 text-amber-300 border border-amber-300/30 hover:bg-amber-300/20 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium

tabs.style: Shadcn Tabs, but remove all rounded corners (rounded-none). Active tab gets a stark white or green bottom border, inactive tabs remain muted grey. High contrast.

badges.online: bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono
badges.offline: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono
badges.warning: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono

gauges.style: Minimalist arc with a thick stroke. Background track in #232A26. Value text in the center using JetBrains Mono.

ai_assistant_panel.style: Fixed floating panel or collapsible right sidebar. Dark amber/yellow subtle tint for AI-generated text. Use the provided yerba_mate_texture as an ultra-low opacity (5%) background image in this panel to give it depth. Absolutely no purple or generic AI gradients.

icons_and_assets.style: Weight: 'regular' or 'light'. Strict geometric icons for SCADA.

motion_and_interactions.animations: Minimal. Use rapid transitions (100ms) for hover states. No bouncy physics. State changes should feel immediate and reliable, like a hardware interface.
motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must lighten background on hover and increase text contrast.

backgrounds.description: Abstract macro photography of dried yerba mate leaves in dark cinematic lighting. Use with very low opacity (e.g., 5-10%) as a subtle background texture in the AI Assistant sidebar or overall dashboard wrapper to add industrial/organic depth without distraction.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='modbus-status-badge', data-testid='export-csv-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React + FastAPI digital twin dashboard for an industrial yerba mate production facility.
Enforce the 'Tactical Control Room' look. The UI should be dense, grid-based, and highly structured. Avoid soft shadows, rounded corners, or playful aesthetics.
Use Recharts for all data visualization. Follow the styling in `chart_styling` exactly. For the Zapecado chart, implement a ReferenceLine at 600°C for the ceiling limit.
For the 4 Maduración chambers, use a tight CSS Grid to display the 4 identical cards, ensuring high density without scrolling.
Integrate the 'yerba_mate_texture' background image selectively, such as in the AI panel, with opacity-5 or blend-overlay to subtly hint at the agricultural context.
Replace the 'purple AI' paradigm. Gemini 3 Flash UI elements should use the amber/yellow accents specified to convey 'insight' rather than 'magic'.
Ensure the layout accommodates live data streams and the Modbus/MQTT/OPC UA connection status indicators visibly in the global header.
All components should be pure HTML/Tailwind with Shadcn used only for complex interactives (Tabs, Dropdowns, Dialogs). Customize Shadcn to remove rounded corners (rounded-none).
